data.body: PHASE 1 DONE (registry hardening). criteria_v7.json: 31 descriptors, all with checklist[] (item D) + declarative applies_at{} (item A foundation, lifted from retune.py: levels/container_only/suppress_types[bug]/suppress_when[test_task,mechanical_leaf]). E5 retuned (item A): scenario rewritten to gate on 'introduces testable behavior', raise bar (thin->PASS), scope to story+task (not epics), suppress test-tasks. Routing (item B): T10/T11 flipped 1-TURN->AGENT (codebase-grounded IaC/migration); G6/G1G2/E4/A1/T1/T3/T8/G3/G4 already AGENT. DELIBERATELY kept COH+T9 at 1-TURN (correcting STATUS list: COH is text-internal cross-section, T9 concurrency is plan-text-judgable; their AMBIGUOUS-on-clean is a decisiveness problem -> SYSTEM decisiveness lever, not tooling) — to be validated by AGENT-routing A/B. Guard passes (25/25 single-turn+overlay, 6 agent-tier). New substrate harnesses/gate_lib.py: robust_findings() (item E parse hardening: never crash on no_tool_use/empty/malformed; coerce to schema; synth INDETERMINATE for missing ids; retry), SYSTEM+DECISIVENESS lever, declarative applies() filter, base_chunk(model)xsize_factor chunker, det_overlays (T1..T12 incl new T10/T11/T12), hardened single_turn()/agent() wrappers. Self-test: epic->20 / story->24 / task->29 candidate criteria, bug->[] (exempt), det_overlays fires T10/T11/T12 correctly. NEXT: E4 generalization on rebar+snap corpuses.
